feed.title: Pronounce — recent dictionary additions
feed.subtitle: How engineers actually pronounce project / product / jargon names. Community-maintained.

entry.title: Megatron — meg a tron
entry.summary: Megatron is pronounced "meg a tron" (/ˈmɛɡəˌtrɒn/). "MEG-uh-tron" — large-scale training framework.

entry.title: DeepSpeed — deep speed
entry.summary: DeepSpeed is pronounced "deep speed" (/ˈdiːpˌspiːd/). "DEEP-speed".

entry.title: Axolotl — ak so lot ul
entry.summary: Axolotl is pronounced "ak so lot ul" (/ˈæksəlɒtl/). "AK-so-lot-ul" — fine-tuning framework.

entry.title: Unsloth — un sloth
entry.summary: Unsloth is pronounced "un sloth" (/ʌnˈslɒθ/). "un-SLOTH" — fast LLM fine-tuning.

entry.title: Devin — dev in
entry.summary: Devin is pronounced "dev in" (/ˈdɛvɪn/). "DEV-in" — AI software engineer.

entry.title: Sweep — sweep
entry.summary: Sweep is pronounced "sweep" (/swiːp/). "sweep" — AI code review.

entry.title: Magnitude — mag ni tude
entry.summary: Magnitude is pronounced "mag ni tude" (/ˈmæɡnɪˌtjuːd/). "MAG-ni-tude" — agent testing platform.

entry.title: Bun Test — bun test
entry.summary: Bun Test is pronounced "bun test" (/bʌn tɛst/). "BUN-test".

entry.title: Mocha — mo ka
entry.summary: Mocha is pronounced "mo ka" (/ˈmoʊkə/). "MO-ka" — like the coffee.

entry.title: Chai — chai
entry.summary: Chai is pronounced "chai" (/tʃaɪ/). "chai" — like the tea.

entry.title: Selenium — se lee nee um
entry.summary: Selenium is pronounced "se lee nee um" (/səˈliːniəm/). "se-LEE-nee-um" — like the element.

entry.title: JUnit — J unit
entry.summary: JUnit is pronounced "J unit" (/ˌdʒeɪ ˈjuːnɪt/). "J-unit".

entry.title: pytest — pie test
entry.summary: pytest is pronounced "pie test" (/ˈpaɪtɛst/). "PIE-test".

entry.title: recursion — re curr zhun
entry.summary: recursion is pronounced "re curr zhun" (/rɪˈkɜːrʒən/). "re-CUR-zhun".

entry.title: polymorphism — pol ee mor fizm
entry.summary: polymorphism is pronounced "pol ee mor fizm" (/ˌpɒliˈmɔːrfɪzəm/). "pol-ee-MOR-fizm".

entry.title: encapsulation — en cap soo lay shun
entry.summary: encapsulation is pronounced "en cap soo lay shun" (/ɪnˌkæpsjʊˈleɪʃən/). "en-cap-soo-LAY-shun".

entry.title: iterator — it er ay ter
entry.summary: iterator is pronounced "it er ay ter" (/ˈɪtəˌreɪtər/). "IT-er-AY-ter".

entry.title: generator — jen er ay ter
entry.summary: generator is pronounced "jen er ay ter" (/ˈdʒɛnəˌreɪtər/). "JEN-er-AY-ter".

entry.title: MessagePack — message pack
entry.summary: MessagePack is pronounced "message pack" (/ˈmɛsɪdʒˌpæk/). "MESSAGE-pack".

entry.title: Avro — av ro
entry.summary: Avro is pronounced "av ro" (/ˈævroʊ/). "AV-ro".

entry.title: Parquet — par kay
entry.summary: Parquet is pronounced "par kay" (/pɑːrˈkeɪ/). "par-KAY" — like the floor.

entry.title: Arrow — arrow
entry.summary: Arrow is pronounced "arrow" (/ˈæroʊ/). "AR-row".

entry.title: Iceberg — ice berg
entry.summary: Iceberg is pronounced "ice berg" (/ˈaɪsˌbɜːrɡ/). "ICE-berg".

entry.title: Hudi — who dee
entry.summary: Hudi is pronounced "who dee" (/ˈhuːdi/). "HOO-dee".

entry.title: Delta Lake — del ta lake
entry.summary: Delta Lake is pronounced "del ta lake" (/ˈdɛltə leɪk/). "DEL-ta lake".
